message:
test(proptest): add 27 property tests for dual_run_shadow_comparator module

New proptest file covering serde roundtrips for all 7 enum types
(DualRunPriority, MatchStatus, DriftCategory, DriftSeverity,
DriftAction, ResolutionStatus, CutoverDecision) plus TriageTelemetry,
DriftSeverity/DualRunPriority ordering properties, comparison workflow
invariants (matching outputs, exit code/stdout divergence detection,
assertion match rate bounds), performance delta correctness, triage
lifecycle (add → triage → resolve), gate evaluation for empty workflow,
and telemetry counter accuracy.

All 27 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
